action: Vérifier l’application du coupon et rembourser/ajuster la course, puis corriger la logique de remise et informer le client.

content: I ordered food tonight and my delivery person decided that they were going to deliver it to the wrong location take a picture at the wrong location and then take the food with them and instead of receiving at least a refund for my order I was told that my order was ineligible for refund because there was a picture attached to the order
action: Enquêter sur le livreur, vérifier la preuve de livraison (GPS/photo) et traiter un remboursement.

content: UBER BD ATTENTION!!! Hello, we customers don’t get enough safety while using uber. Drivers (specially bike driver)doing everything whatever they want... Plssss do something. I got 51 bdt fine ticket without doinf anything.....
action: Renforcer le contrôle et la formation des chauffeurs (notamment moto) sur le respect du code de la route et la sécurité

content: Unable to connect to the drivers since months so can't use it anymore
action: Enquêter et corriger le problème de connexion/mise en relation avec les chauffeurs

content: Just found out from the driver that out of $13 fare they only pay the driver $6, no wonder he was mad and driving like a mad man. Uber you need to treat your drivers A LOT better so they can treat us better. Don't tip either uber steals the driver's tips by reducing the tipped amount from their next fare.
action: Clarifier et garantir la transparence sur la part chauffeur et le traitement des pourboires

content: Driver time is misleading. Uber eats took 4 h to deliver an order. Also, there is no help chat.
action: Corriger l’estimation de temps de livraison et ajouter un chat d’assistance accessible

content: The most untrusted apps are now a days rude booking apps. Accepting the rides, drivers don't respond, even don't move from their location for long periods, then cancels the rides.
action: Pénaliser les chauffeurs qui acceptent sans se déplacer ni répondre puis annulent, et améliorer le suivi/confirmation du départ.

content: I got an uber to the grocery store in the early evening. The store is 2 miles away. Traffic was light and i was by the road waiting for the driver when he pulled up. When i ordered the ride the app quoted the fee at $6 and some change. I use uber often on quick little trips such as this and that was the common price. I paid with an uber gift card and went about my shopping when i arrived i noticed they had charged me $15!! I had no choice but to order uber home. The trip home was $6. What gives
action: Vérifier la tarification et rembourser/ajuster la course facturée à 15 $ si erreur.

content: The drivers are mostly profeasional.However, I have gorten the occasional crazy driver. Who will steal from you by cancelling the ride or charging you for rides u did not take.
action: Renforcer la détection et le traitement des fraudes (annulations abusives et courses facturées à tort) et rembourser rapidement.

content: I keep getting connected to drivers who arrive at the correct pickup spot, but wrong SIDE of the pickup spot . I try messaging & calling them to explain my exact location, but they don't understand due to language barriers. Then they cancel. One example: Middle of the night in the RAIN, I had THREE drivers in a row cancel after they arrived. It should not have taken me almost an hour to travel FIVE minutes away. Uber is trash, I'm uninstalling & sticking with Lyft from now on.
action: Améliorer la communication chauffeur-passager et réduire les annulations liées à des malentendus de localisation.

content: no permite contactarse con los rider por articulos perdidos
action: Corriger la fonctionnalité de contact avec le chauffeur pour les objets perdus et proposer un canal alternatif de support

content: horrible service especially ripping off the poor drivers.
action: Revoir la politique de commissions et de rémunération des chauffeurs

content: Ненавижу это приложение, я опаздывала на свою работу в которой у меня была презентация моего продукта и именно в тот день моя машина сломалась, решила заказать этот Убер и именно в этот день моему уберу понадобилось моё id шикарно, я опоздала на работу на 3 часа Требуете id обрабатывайте б ляьь быстрее Я все нервы изза этого потратила
action: Accélérer et stabiliser la vérification d'identité (ID) pour éviter les retards

content: Pay your drivers more and stop ripping your customers off!!!
action: Revoir la tarification et augmenter la rémunération des chauffeurs

content: Wastes ur time showing 'finding driver' and fails finally. Very irritating and time wasting
action: Corriger le bug de recherche de chauffeur et améliorer la fiabilité de l’attribution

content: Edit: Still 1 star, would give 0 if I could, same issues persist. Drivers make you wait, arrive to the pickup point and then cancel, even when you message them where you're headed to the moment they take the trip. Uber One is actually a waste, as it makes drivers cancel more often. Terrible customer service by the way.
action: Réduire les annulations abusives après arrivée au point de prise en charge et améliorer le support client pour ces cas
